app.name: The Ark AI
app.description: Pay-per-task AI assistant powered by Bitcoin Lightning. 120+ AI tools including research, writing, code generation, translation, image creation, data analysis, and more. No subscriptions, no signups. Just results.
app.audience: Young Kenyans and Africans (18-30), university students, freelancers, hustlers, cyber cafe users, tech-curious youth
app.problem: AI tools like ChatGPT require subscriptions ($20/month) which is unaffordable for most African youth. The Ark lets you pay only for what you use, starting from KES 10 via M-Pesa.
app.differentiator: No subscription, no signup, pay with M-Pesa or Bitcoin Lightning. 120+ specialized AI tools. African language support (Swahili, Amharic, Zulu, etc). Cheapest AI on the continent.

imageGen.basePrompt: Hyper-modern smartphone screen mockup showing an AI chat interface with futuristic neon accents. Young African person using phone, cool urban setting, vibrant colors, Gen-Z aesthetic. Shot on iPhone 15 Pro, natural lighting, portrait orientation.
imageGen.style: modern, cool, vibrant, Gen-Z aesthetic, afrofuturistic, neon accents on dark backgrounds
